project_type: pnpm monorepo with apps/, packages/, services/ workspaces - Fastify backends, Next.js frontends
language: TypeScript (strict mode, ES2022 target, ESNext modules)
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 + turbo for task orchestration. Workspace packages linked via workspace:*
test_framework: vitest v2 with globals enabled. Tests co-located in __tests__/ directories alongside services. Mock patterns use vi.fn() with createMockXyz() factory helpers.
build_command: N/A - no build step needed, TypeScript used directly. Typecheck via tsc --noEmit.
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run from repo root. 2. Confirm 79+ test files pass (1 pre-existing shared-ui DOM failure is acceptable).
setup_instructions: pnpm install from repo root. All workspace packages auto-linked.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. No Docker daemon confirmed. No actual database or Redis available for integration tests - use mocks.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TypeScript strict with no `any`. Zod validation on all inputs. Co-located .test.ts for every service.

key_patterns.service_pattern: Class-based services with constructor DI (prisma, aiEngine, etc). See apps/quantmail/backend/services/email.service.ts
key_patterns.test_pattern: createMockXyz() factory returning vi.fn() mocks, service instantiated with mock as never. See apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/ai-triage.service.test.ts
key_patterns.route_pattern: Fastify plugin pattern: export default async function routeName(fastify: FastifyInstance). Zod validation inline. See apps/quantmail/backend/routes/ai-services.ts
key_patterns.package_json_pattern: type: module, workspace:* deps, vitest run as test script, tsc --noEmit as typecheck
key_patterns.server_core: @quant/server-core provides createApp(), errorHandlerPlugin, authPlugin, healthPlugin, AppConfig, AuthenticatedRequest
key_patterns.ai_engine: @quant/ai exports AIEngine with infer() method, MailAIService, ChatAIService etc. Uses Vercel AI SDK under the hood.
key_patterns.queue_pattern: @quant/queue exports TypedQueue (BullMQ wrapper with Zod schema validation) and createTypedWorker

directory_structure: Root: apps/ (9 app frontends+backends), packages/ (shared libs: ai, auth, common, database, queue, storage, server-core, etc.), services/ (standalone microservices: smtp-inbound, ws-gateway, etc.)
